comments.text: Small point: the theorem $1^{(k)}_A(n) \gg n^{c/\log\log n}$ was independently proven by Erdős and Chowla&Pillai (not just Chowla). A reference taken from the 1965 paper by Erdős: S. Chowla and S. S. Pillai, The number of representations of a number as a sum of non-negative nth powers, Quart. J. Math. Oxford, 7 (1936) 56-59.
